title: reqlan workspace config
description: Optional per-directory Reqlan workspace configuration (.rqconfig.json). The applying file for an .rq document is the nearest ancestor .rqconfig.json.

importRoots.description: Import-root alias mappings. Each entry binds an alias string to a directory. When omitted or empty after validation, the default mapping is alias '@' with the workspace folder as root. When several aliases could match a path, the longest alias wins.

alias.description: Prefix used before '/' in aliased import paths. Example: alias '@' matches '@/reqs/style.rq'.

root.description: Directory this alias resolves against. Relative paths are resolved from the directory containing this .rqconfig.json. Absolute filesystem paths and file:// URIs are also accepted. When omitted, the workspace folder that contains the .rq file is used.
